title: Cilantro-Lime Coleslaw
description: A simple, bright coleslaw with cilantro, lime, and a light creamy dressing. Works as a side or as a topping for tacos, fish, or wraps.

ingredients.name: lime juice (about half a juicy lime)

instructions.text: Whisk together mayo or Greek yogurt, lime juice, honey, and a pinch of salt in a large bowl.
Add coleslaw mix and cilantro. Toss well to coat. Taste and adjust salt or lime.
Let sit 5–10 minutes before serving to let the flavors develop. Toss again before plating.

notes:
Greek yogurt keeps it lighter than mayo and adds a slight tang that works well with the lime.

Works as a standalone side or as a topping for tacos, fish wraps, or pulled pork.
